subject: [PATCH v2] mm/mempolicy: track page allocations per mempolicy

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the counters' ability to capture allocation distribution due to migration. Suggested that the patch should clarify how these counters are intended to be used.

reviews.author: JP Kobryn (Meta)
reviews.summary: Responded to Gregory's concerns by explaining that the patch resolves an ambiguity in previous versions and provides a clear workflow for using the new counters.

2026-03-08.patch_summary: The patch aims to track page allocations per mempolicy, resolving ambiguity in previous versions by accounting for fallback cases.
